---
id: get-unavailable-dates
title: "Get unavailable dates for a property"
description: "Retrieve all dates that are unavailable (booked or blocked) for a property. Returns an array of date strings that cannot be selected as check-in or stay dates. Use this to grey out dates in a calendar/datepicker widget."
sidebar_label: "Get unavailable dates for a property"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get unavailable dates for a property"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/properties/{id}/unavailableDates"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve all dates that are unavailable (booked or blocked) for a property. Returns an array of date strings that cannot be selected as check-in or stay dates. Use this to grey out dates in a calendar/datepicker widget.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-unavailable-dates.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
